raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus","name":"Before we get specific, what feels most useful to talk through today?","description":"Safe opener that lets Kenji set the agenda without introducing a concern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation picture","name":"What feels clear about what good looks like in your role right now?","description":"Surfaces where his bar for success is solid versus still fuzzy after the first few months.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Fuzzy parts","name":"What still feels fuzzy about expectations this week?","description":"Gets him to name the most uncertain piece of the role without turning it into a performance check.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Hardest ask","name":"What feels hardest to raise early with the team?","description":"Explores whether he feels safe asking for help before issues compound.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Help threshold","name":"What would make it easier to ask for help sooner?","description":"Surfaces the conditions that would reduce hesitation and friction around support-seeking.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Requirement churn","name":"Where are shifting requirements creating the most rework for you?","description":"Identifies the concrete points where churn is costing time or confidence.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision support","name":"What decision would help you move faster this week?","description":"Finds the manager intervention that would reduce uncertainty and unblock progress.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Protect the week","name":"What should we take off your plate first?","description":"Forces a trade-off and reveals what is creating unnecessary load right now.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Confidence source","name":"What part of the work has been giving you the most confidence lately?","description":"Looks for where he is still engaged and building momentum, not just where things are hard.","purpose":"competency","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step focus","name":"Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes the conversation by turning the discussion into a priority and next step.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
